allow: Bash(which mvn || brew list maven 2>/dev/null | head -1 || echo "Maven not found")
Bash(docker stop flight_postgres flight_redis && docker rm flight_postgres flight_redis)
Bash(docker exec aircraft_postgres psql -U aircraft -d aircraftdb -c "SELECT 1;" 2>&1)
Bash(docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d 2>&1 | tail -6)
